scenarios.name: create-adr-postgresql
scenarios.rationale: Response B explicitly lists all required section headers (Status, Date, Context, Decision, Alternatives Considered, Consequences) as separate sections, while Response A embeds Status and Date in a table and lacks distinct section headers, slightly reducing its coverage.

scenarios.name: generate-readme
scenarios.rationale: Both responses include all required sections: a one‑paragraph description, quick start, commands table, architecture overview linking to ADR‑001, and contributing guidelines.
